steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content:
The diameter is $24$ inches, so the radius is half of that:
$$
r=\frac{24}{2}=12
$$
The height is $9$ inches.

steps.title: Use the cone volume formula
steps.content: The volume of a cone is $$ V=\frac{1}{3}\pi r^2h $$ Substitute $r=12$ and $h=9$: $$ V=\frac{1}{3}\pi(12)^2(9)=432\pi $$ Since the volume is $k\pi$, $k=432$. The answer is 432.
